features: 48-Hour Sweat and Odour Protection – Provides up to 48 hours of effective protection against sweat and body odour, ensuring long-lasting freshness. ​
ProDerma Technology – Incorporates a unique skin-caring complex that mimics the skin's natural protective layer, helping to protect underarm skin and reduce irritation. ​
Aloe Vera Enriched – Contains Aloe Vera, known for its soothing properties, to calm and care for sensitive underarm skin. ​
Alcohol-Free Formula – Designed without alcohol to minimize the risk of skin irritation, making it suitable for sensitive skin types. ​
Light, Fresh Fragrance – Features a gentle and refreshing scent that keeps you feeling clean and confident throughout the day. ​
Pack of Three – Convenient pack of three 250ml sprays ensures you have ample supply for continuous use.​
